name: 斗地主VR
developer: Shanghai YiJun Network Info Technologies Inc.
publisher: Shanghai YiJun Network Info Technologies Inc.
short_description: A strong Chinese characteristics of the poker game
detailed_description: Landlord is a strong Chinese characteristics of the poker game, simple and interesting, fast, entertaining! Three players sit with a table, each set a landlord and two farmers, landlord and farmers to play, first out of the cards to win. The virtual environment and the real environment is same, The player controls the virtual hand to draw out the card.
